title: DTC -Yukemuri Junjou Hen- from HiGH & LOW
original_title: DTC ―湯けむり純情篇― from HiGH&LOW
overview: The movie is about the endless miracles during the motorcycle trip of Dan, Tettsu, and Chiharu, the Sannō Rengōkai trio (also known as DTC).
